news_items.headline: With 104.5 mph K, Miz tops himself for the hardest ever by a starter
Mets SS Francisco Lindor could be back by the end of June
news_items.summary: Manager Carlos Mendoza said Lindor, who suffered a strained left calf while running the bases against the Minnesota Twins on April 22, played a two-inning simulated game Friday.

news_items.headline: Alcantara becomes 5th active Dominican-born pitcher to reach 1,000 K's
105 mph?! Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski throws the fastest pitch ever recorded by a starter (again)
news_items.summary: Jacob Misiorowski threw the four fastest pitches ever recorded by a starter in a single inning.

news_items.headline: Chicago Cubs vs. San Francisco Giants preview, Friday 6/12, 9:15 CT
news_items.summary: The Cubs open a three-game series in San Francisco.

news_items.headline: Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals vs Minnesota Twins Friday
news_items.summary: After taking 2 out of 3 from the New York Mets, the St. Louis Cardinals travel to Minnesota to take on the Twins. Friday night, it’s Kyle Leahy on the mound for the Cardinals as he’ll do battle with Joe Ryan, the starter for the Twins. First pitch is scheduled for 7:10pm central time at […]

news_items.headline: Friday's Mets-Braves game gets new start time after rain delay
news_items.summary: Bad weather has delayed the start of Friday's game between the Mets and Atlanta Braves at Citi Field. No new start time has been announced.

news_items.headline: Royals vs Astros Game discussion 6/12
news_items.summary: A battle of rookies between Luinder Avila and Tatsuya Imai

news_items.headline: Astros vs. Royals Game Discussion: 6/12/2026
news_items.summary: TONIGHT’S GAME: The Houston Astros (31-39) continue a six-game road trip with the first game of a three-game series against the Kansas City Royals (28-41) tonight at Kauffman Stadium. RHP Tatsuya Imai (3-3, 5.24 ERA) will be on the mound for the Astros, opposite RHP Luinder Avila (1-2, 4.02 ERA) and the Royals. ABOUT IMAI: […]
